user.title: Add Thread Panel
user.description: Paste the panel's manifest YAML below. Reference templates for each product live in the repository under panels/[panel_id]/ha/manifest.yaml — copy one, adjust the entity_ids to match your Home Assistant install, and paste the result here.

error.invalid_manifest: Manifest could not be parsed. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: A panel with this panel_id is already configured.

init.title: Edit Thread Panel manifest
init.description: Edit the manifest YAML for this panel. Add or remove entities, adjust attribute allowlists, etc. The panel_id must stay the same — changing it would orphan this config entry; delete and re-add the integration instead.

error.invalid_manifest: Manifest could not be parsed. See the Home Assistant log for details.
error.panel_id_mismatch: The panel_id in the pasted manifest doesn't match this entry. To reassign a panel_id, delete this integration and add a new one.
